[color=black]Decipher (v 1.1)

Game design and code
[color=black]Otavio Furlan[/color]



[size=18]This game was made in Construct 3[/size]

[size=36]HOW TO PLAY[/size]

• The first field will display a series of symbols, each associated with a specific letter.

• In the second field, you'll find only symbols, with no letters.

• Your challenge is to relate them and input the correct letters and form valid words.
